title: Terms of Service
description: Terms of Service for Acme Inc.

legalSections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
legalSections.content: By accessing and using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

legalSections.title: 2. Services
legalSections.content: We provide digital marketing services including website design, social media management, indoor billboard advertising, and PPC advertising.

legalSections.title: 3. Payment Terms
legalSections.content: Payment terms will be outlined in your service agreement. Invoices are due upon receipt unless otherwise specified.

legalSections.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
legalSections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

legalSections.title: 5. Contact Us
legalSections.content: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us.

metadata.title: Terms of Service
metadata.description: Review the {business} Terms of Service covering acceptable use of our website, intellectual property, third-party services, and your responsibilities.
metadata.keywords: terms of service {business}, website terms, acceptable use, intellectual property terms
